description_long: This is a modern main battle tank with a low-profile, angular turret and a long, thick-barreled cannon extending from the front. The hull and turret are covered in modular, sloped armor panels, providing extensive protection across all sides. The tank features wide, robust tracks with detailed road wheels and side skirts, enhancing its mobility over rough terrain. Two prominent headlights are visible on the front, and a tall communications antenna rises from the turret. The exterior is finished in a digital camouflage pattern of green and brown tones, designed to blend with natural environments. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present on the hull or turret.
description: A heavily armored, modern main battle tank with a long cannon, sloped modular armor, and digital green-brown camouflage. It features wide tracks, a low-profile turret, and a tall antenna.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank's dual headlights, sloped frontal armor, and the main cannon extending forward.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlighting the angular turret, side skirts, and the length of the cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, exhausts, and the rear of the tracks.
description_view_3: Left side view emphasizing the full length of the tracks, side armor, and the turret's profile.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, modular armor panels on the hull and turret; side skirts provide additional protection to the tracks.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in olive green and brown with pixelated shapes.
